isDisabled.description: Disable the open/close interaction and visually subdues the trigger

element.description:
Applied to the entire .euiAccordion wrapper.
When using `fieldset`, it will enforce `buttonElement = legend` as well.

isLoading.description: Change `extraAction` and children into a loading spinner

buttonClassName.description: Class that will apply to the trigger for the accordion.

buttonProps.description:
Apply more props to the triggering button.

Includes optional `paddingSize` prop which allows sizes of `s`, `m`, or `l`.
Note: Padding will not be present on the side closest to the accordion arrow.

buttonContentClassName.description: Class that will apply to the trigger content for the accordion.

buttonContent.description: The content of the clickable trigger

buttonElement.description:
Applied to the main button receiving the `onToggle` event.
Anything other than the default `button` does not support removing the arrow display (for accessibility of focus).

arrowProps.description: Extra props to pass to the EuiButtonIcon containing the arrow.

extraAction.description: Will appear right aligned against the button. Useful for separate actions like deletions.

initialIsOpen.description: The accordion will start in the open state.

onToggle.description: Optional callback method called on open and close with a single `isOpen` parameter

paddingSize.description: The padding around the exposed accordion content.

arrowDisplay.description: Placement of the arrow indicator, or 'none' to hide it.

forceState.description: Control the opening of accordion via prop

isLoadingMessage.description: Choose whether the loading message replaces the content. Customize the message by passing a node

children.description: ReactNode to render as this component's content

iconType.description: Sits left of the `title` and only when `title` is present

iconSize.description: Change the size of the icon in the `title`

iconProps.description: Further extend the props applied to EuiIcon

background.description:
Adds a background color to the entire group,
applying the correct text color to the `title` only

titleSize.description: Title sizing equivalent to EuiTitle, but only `s` and smaller

aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

isCollapsible.description:
If `true`, wraps children in the body of an accordion,
requiring the prop `title` to be used as the button.
When `false`, simply renders a div without any accordion functionality.

title.description:
The title gets wrapped in the appropriate heading level
with the option to add an iconType
